ssm.association.instanceassociationoutpu.Docs: `S3OutputLocation` is a property of the [InstanceAssociationOutputLocation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-ssm-association-instanceassociationoutputlocation.html) property that specifies an Amazon S3 bucket where you want to store the results of this request.
